phases.name: Magic Number Extraction
phases.goal: Extract hardcoded values into named constants for maintainability

tasks.description: Extract SECONDS_PER_DAY and SECONDS_PER_HOUR constants in log_cleanup_tasks.py
steps: Add SECONDS_PER_DAY = 86400 and SECONDS_PER_HOUR = 3600 at module level near other constants
Replace hardcoded 86400 on lines 301, 575, 850 with SECONDS_PER_DAY
Replace hardcoded 3600 on line 415 with SECONDS_PER_HOUR
Run ruff check to verify

tasks.description: Extract subprocess timeout constants in status_logs.py
steps: Add JOURNALCTL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 15 and SCRIPT_EXECUTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 30 at module level
Replace hardcoded 15 on line 255 with JOURNALCTL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
Replace hardcoded 30 on line 566 with SCRIPT_EXECUTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
Run ruff check to verify
Add class constants at top of StrategyStorage class: UNDERPERFORMING_SHARPE_THRESHOLD = 0.5, DEFAULT_PERFORMANCE_THRESHOLD = 0.9, PERFORMANCE_WINDOW_DAYS = 30
Replace hardcoded 0.5 in get_symbols_needing_strategies SQL query with class constant
Replace default 0.9 in get_underperforming_strategies with class constant
Update 30-day intervals to use f-string with PERFORMANCE_WINDOW_DAYS
Run ruff check to verify

tasks.description: Extract error message truncation constants in strategy_monitoring_tasks.py
steps: Add ERROR_MESSAGE_TRUNCATE = 100 at module level
Replace str(e)[:100] on lines 67, 381, 889 with str(e)[:ERROR_MESSAGE_TRUNCATE]
Run ruff check to verify
Add TOP_WATCHLIST_SYMBOLS = 20, TOP_WATCHLIST_TRIGGER_SYMBOLS = 10, MAX_EVOLUTION_STRATEGIES = 5 at module level
Replace hardcoded 20 on line 656 with TOP_WATCHLIST_SYMBOLS
Replace hardcoded 10 on line 911 with TOP_WATCHLIST_TRIGGER_SYMBOLS
Replace hardcoded 5 on line 823 with MAX_EVOLUTION_STRATEGIES
Run ruff check to verify
Add SECTOR_MAX_LOSS_THRESHOLD = -60.0 and SECTOR_MAX_GAIN_THRESHOLD = 200.0 at module level
Replace hardcoded -60 and 200 on lines 698-702 with the constants
Run ruff check to verify

phases.name: DRY Violation Fixes - Small
phases.goal: Consolidate duplicate patterns within single files

steps: Create helper function _build_cleanup_result(task_id, dry_run, task_specific_fields, would_action_list=None) near other helper functions
Helper should build standardized result dict with task_id, duration_seconds, success merged with task_specific_fields
If dry_run and would_action_list, add to result
Update one cleanup task (cleanup_old_logs_task) to use the helper as proof of concept
Run ruff check and verify function works
Create helper function _handle_missing_directory(task_id, dry_run, directory_path, task_name, log_id) near other helper functions
Helper should check if directory exists, log warning if not, and return early_result dict or None
Update cleanup_old_backups_task to use the helper (lines 544-556)
Run ruff check to verify
Add WS_ENDPOINT_STATUS_CODES = (403, 426, 400) at module level near other constants
Replace inline (403, 426, 400) on line 361-362 with the constant
Run ruff check to verify
Add MAX_HEALTH_CHECK_BATCH_SIZE = 1000 at module level near other constants
Replace hardcoded 1000 on line 864 with the constant
Add brief comment explaining the limit prevents long-running health checks
Run ruff check to verify

phases.name: Helper Function Extraction
phases.goal: Extract reusable patterns into helper functions

steps: Create helper function _calculate_directory_size(directory: Path) -> tuple[int, int] that returns (total_bytes, file_count)
Implement using: sum(f.stat().st_size for f in dir.rglob('*') if f.is_file()) pattern
Update cleanup_solution_state_task (line 849) to use the helper
Run ruff check to verify
Create helper function _substitute_path_params(path: str, value: str = 'test-probe-value') -> str
Implement using: re.sub(r'\{[^}]+\}', value, path)
Update _build_check_url (line 111) and discover_websocket_endpoints (line 354) to use the helper
Run ruff check to verify
Create helper function normalize_log_level(level: str) -> str that handles WARNING/WARN normalization
Update VALID_LEVELS derivation (line 267) to use the helper
Update set_log_level (lines 553-555) to use the helper
Run ruff check to verify
Create helper method _ensure_symbol_exists(self, conn, symbol: str) -> None in StrategyStorage class
Move symbol existence check (lines 79-86) into the helper
Update store_strategy to call the helper
Run ruff check to verify

phases.name: Long Function Decomposition
phases.goal: Break down long functions into smaller, focused helpers

tasks.description: Extract helpers from get_market_intelligence in market.py
steps: Create _validate_and_build_options_activity(options_data_raw) helper to encapsulate options data validation (lines 398-412)
Update get_market_intelligence to call the helper
Run ruff check and pytest tests/api/test_market.py -x -q to verify
tasks.verification: ruff check backend/app/api/market.py && timeout 60 pytest tests/api/test_market.py -x -q --tb=short

steps: Create helper function _get_cache_targets() -> list[dict] that returns the cache_targets list (lines 957-1004)
Update cleanup_cache_directories_task to call the helper
Run ruff check to verify

tasks.description: Extract helpers from get_sector_history in market.py
steps: Create _validate_sector_price_change(rows, symbol) -> bool helper to check for unrealistic changes (lines 698-702)
Update get_sector_history to use the helper
Run ruff check and pytest tests/api/test_market.py -x -q to verify
tasks.verification: ruff check backend/app/api/market.py && timeout 60 pytest tests/api/test_market.py -x -q --tb=short

steps: Run full backend test suite with timeout
Verify no new failures introduced by refactoring
Run frontend build to verify no type errors
Confirm build completes successfully
